ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>Overall, the response is relevant but lacks naturalness and persona consistency due to being too formal in a casual setting. Short note: Needs more personality for better rapport with player.<|end_of_output|>

baseline_no_context<TAB>3<TATAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Overall, the response is balanced and maintains persona consistency but could improve context relevance. Short note: Good balance of elements.<|end_of_output|>

The response is highly consistent with the persona of a methodical and risk-aware Systems Engineer, but it could be more natural in tone to match an urgent situation. It also slightly misses context relevance as it doesn't address specifics like discount or expedited process details directly tied to constraints mentioned by player input (e.g., curfew).
